metadata.title: Client Testimonials – Real Stories from Global Companies
metadata.description: Discover what our clients say about Jackson & Frank. Real stories from HR leaders, CEOs, and operations teams who scaled globally with our EOR, payroll, immigration, and compliance services.

definition.title: Loved by teams hiring globally
definition.subtitle: What our clients say
definition.description: From fast-growing startups to global enterprises, HR and operations leaders trust Jackson & Frank to expand into new markets with compliance, speed, and peace of mind. Hear their stories.
definition.imageAlt: Happy global teams working with Jackson & Frank

trustSignals.title: Trusted by global teams
trustSignals.subtitle: Numbers that reflect the trust our clients place in us every day.

featured.subtitle: Customer spotlight
featured.title: Real stories, real outcomes
featured.description: Three of the leaders we've partnered with share how Jackson & Frank helped them launch faster, stay compliant, and scale across borders without the usual friction.

items.name: Lina C.
items.review: Our expansion into Germany and France wouldn't have been possible without the team's guidance. What stood out to me was their local knowledge-they set up compliant employment contracts and streamlined payroll within just a few weeks, ensuring our launch stayed on schedule.

items.name: Sarah K.
items.review: We needed to hire talent in Spain and Italy quickly, and Jackson & Frank delivered beyond expectations. Their EOR solution allowed us to onboard 15 engineers in just three weeks. The compliance team ensured every contract met local regulations, and their payroll system integrated seamlessly with our HRIS.

items.name: David L.
items.metric: Scaled to 8 countries with one partner
items.review: As a startup expanding internationally, we needed a partner who could scale with us. Jackson & Frank has been that partner. They've helped us hire in 8 countries now, and each expansion has been smoother than the last. Their transparent pricing and responsive support team make them stand out.

highlights.subtitle: What clients love
highlights.title: The themes we hear most often
highlights.description: Across hundreds of reviews and conversations, the same strengths come up again and again.

items.title: Local expertise that scales
items.description: In-country specialists who know the labor laws, tax rules, and cultural norms - not a generic playbook.

items.title: Fast, on-the-record answers
items.description: Dedicated account teams that reply in hours, not days, with clear written guidance you can rely on.

items.title: Compliance you can sleep on
items.description: Proactive updates on regulatory changes so you're never caught off guard by a new local rule.

items.title: A true partner mindset
items.description: We treat your growth as our own - flagging risks early and finding creative ways to unblock you.

faqs.title: Questions about working with us
faqs.subtitle: Common questions from teams evaluating Jackson & Frank.

items.question: How are these testimonials collected?
items.answer: All testimonials are from real clients who have used Jackson & Frank's services. Quotes are shared with their permission and lightly edited for clarity. Initials are used where clients prefer to remain anonymous.

items.question: Can I speak directly with a current client as a reference?
items.answer: Yes. For enterprise evaluations, we're happy to arrange a reference call with a current client in a similar industry or region. Reach out to our sales team to request one.

items.question: Do you have case studies with more detail?
items.answer: Absolutely - visit our Success stories page to read in-depth case studies covering the business challenge, our approach, and the measurable results we delivered.

items.question: What industries do your clients come from?
items.answer: Our clients span technology, manufacturing, professional services, life sciences, retail, and more. We support both fast-growing startups and established global enterprises.
